detail.instructions: Implement TryFrom<String> for Host by reusing the existing validate_host helper. Validate through a borrowed view, then store the original String on success.

hints.body: The validate_host helper already contains the validation rules; do not copy them into a second implementation.
Borrow the String with value.as_str() for validation, then return Ok(Self(value)) so the owned allocation is reused.
A canonical solution keeps one validation function and avoids an unnecessary reallocation.

detail.completionExplanation: Supporting owned input can improve adapter ergonomics, but validation rules should still live in one place. Validating through a borrowed view and then storing the original String keeps the API consistent without an extra allocation.

cases.name: port-direct-construction
host-direct-construction
